heroHeadline: BRICS Reaches 10 Members as Indonesia Joins, Reshaping Global Order
heroSubtitle: With Egypt, Ethiopia, Iran, UAE (Jan 2024) and Indonesia (Jan 2025) joining, BRICS now represents ~41% of world GDP (PPP) and ~46% of global population. Under India's 2026 chairmanship, de-dollarization advances amid persistent internal tensions.
footerNote: Data sourced from official BRICS declarations, NDB annual reports, IMF, and major international outlets. Source tiers reflect editorial confidence levels.
